title: coryphantha clavata
intro: Coryphantha clavata, also known as the clavate pincushion cactus, is a species of cactus in the genus Coryphantha. The plant is known for its small, globular stems and fine, white spines. Coryphantha clavata has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, colds, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use in various ways, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
